api.name: discover_services
api.description: List all available x402engine APIs with pricing, endpoints, and payment networks. Call this first.

api.name: service_health
api.description: Get live health metrics for all services - latency, error rates, request volume, and status.

service.description: Filter to a specific service ID. Omit for all.

api.name: generate_image
api.description: Generate an image from a text prompt. Tiers: fast ($0.015), quality ($0.05), text ($0.12). Returns image URL.

api.name: execute_code
api.description: Execute code in a secure sandbox. Supports Python, JavaScript, Bash, R. $0.005 per execution.

api.name: get_crypto_price
api.description: Get current cryptocurrency prices. $0.001 per request.

api.name: get_wallet_balances
api.description: Get token balances for a wallet on any supported chain. $0.005 per request.

api.name: search_flights
api.description: Search flight offers by route and dates. $0.01 per request.

api.name: pin_to_ipfs
api.description: Pin JSON data to IPFS. Returns the CID. $0.01 per pin.

api.name: transcribe_audio
api.description: Transcribe audio to text using Deepgram Nova-3. $0.10 per transcription.

meta.title: x402engine
meta.description: 74 pay-per-call APIs for AI agents via HTTP 402 micropayments. 44 LLMs, image/video generation, crypto data, wallet analytics, web search, code execution, TTS, IPFS, and travel.

X402_PAYMENT_HEADER.title: x402 Payment Header
X402_PAYMENT_HEADER.description: Pre-signed x402 payment header for automatic micropayments. Get one at https://x402engine.app
